Container.Name: ralph
Container.Overview: Ralph is an autonomous AI agent loop that runs AI coding tools (Amp, Claude Code, Antigravity, etc.) repeatedly until all PRD items are complete. Each iteration is a fresh instance with clean context. You can configure which agents are executed by setting the AGENT_ACCOUNTS variable and adding multiple API keys for rotation when limits are reached.

Config.Name: Project Path
Config.Description: Path to your project codebase directory (source code, tests, etc.) on Unraid

Config.Name: PRD File
Config.Description: Select the specific prd.json file on your host system to be mounted for this run (like selecting an ISO for a VM)

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port to map for the Ralph Dashboard Web UI

Config.Name: Active Accounts List
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of accounts to use and rotate (e.g. claude-1,antigravity-1,claude-2)

Config.Name: Max Iterations
Config.Description: Maximum loop iterations to run before stopping if stories aren't completed

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key 1
Config.Description: Anthropic API Key for claude-1 account

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key 2
Config.Description: Anthropic API Key for claude-2 account

Config.Name: Google API Key 1
Config.Description: Google API Key for antigravity-1 account

Config.Name: Google API Key 2
Config.Description: Google API Key for antigravity-2 account

Config.Name: Antigravity API Key 1
Config.Description: Alternative key for antigravity-1 (leave blank if GOOGLE_API_KEY_1 is set)

Config.Name: Antigravity API Key 2
Config.Description: Alternative key for antigravity-2 (leave blank if GOOGLE_API_KEY_2 is set)

Config.Name: Default AI Agent Tool
Config.Description: Fallback default agent tool if AGENT_ACCOUNTS is empty (amp or claude)

Config.Name: Default Anthropic Key
Config.Description: Fallback default Anthropic Key if AGENT_ACCOUNTS is empty

Config.Name: Default Google Key
Config.Description: Fallback default Google Key if AGENT_ACCOUNTS is empty

Config.Name: Additional Arguments
Config.Description: Any additional command-line parameters to pass to ralph.sh (e.g. --input-method file)

Config.Name: Keep Container Alive
Config.Description: Set to true to keep the container running after ralph completes, allowing shell inspection

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone

Config.Name: Amp Config Path
Config.Description: Persistence folder for Amp credentials and settings

Config.Name: Claude Config Path
Config.Description: Persistence folder for Claude Code credentials

Config.Name: Antigravity Config Path
Config.Description: Persistence folder for agy credentials
